CustomField.description: Calculated enrollment open date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both enrollment start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL( Enrollment_Open_Date__c ) && ISNULL(Enrollment_Close_Date__c) , Academic_Term__r.Enrollment_Open_Date__c , Enrollment_Open_Date__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated enrollment open date for status field. Only consider the dates in term if both enrollment start/end date in study offering are empty.
CustomField.label: Enrollment Open Date
